themes.description: Users experience frequent glitches, technical issues, and errors while trading, resulting in losses, failed transactions, and frustration.
themes.business_impact: Revenue loss due to failed trades, high customer churn rate, damage to brand reputation.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Inadequate testing, poor code quality, and insufficient resources for maintenance and updates are contributing to the issues. Additionally, potential design flaws and poor user experience may be exacerbating the problems.
themes.action_plan: • Conduct a thorough review of the codebase, prioritize bug fixing and stability improvements, invest in robust testing and QA processes, revisit design decisions that may be contributing to user frustration, and enhance customer support to address issues promptly.

themes.description: Multiple users reported issues with unresponsive or ineffective customer support, including long wait times, lack of help, and inadequate problem resolution.
themes.business_impact: High risk of customer dissatisfaction and churn due to unresolved issues and unmet expectations.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Inadequate staffing, inefficient support process, or a disconnect between support teams and stakeholders may be contributing to these issues.
themes.action_plan:
• Optimize support process
• Hire additional staff
• Provide clear escalation channels
• Implement real-time issue tracking
• Re-train support teams
